name: Mobvista
description: Chinese mobile ad tech group (parent of Mintegral and Nativex) providing global app monetization and user acquisition.

seo.title: Mobvista — Ad Monetization / Mediation
seo.meta_description: Mobvista: Chinese mobile ad tech group (parent of Mintegral and Nativex) providing global app monetization and user acquisition.

when_to_use: Mintegral in-app bidding and rewarded video monetization SDK for global apps
Nativex performance UA for Chinese advertisers targeting global app markets
Programmatic app monetization via Mintegral SSP across Asia-Pacific
Global app user acquisition and monetization via Mobvista ad tech stack

pros: Owns Mintegral supply and Nativex buying
cons: Ongoing concerns over Mintegral ad fraud history
Transparency gaps in Chinese holding structure
review.verdict: Huge scale and strong APAC play, but reputational baggage from Mintegral SDK past lingers.
review.best_for: Global apps scaling in Asia and emerging markets with tolerance for opaque supply.
review.not_for: Brand-safe Western enterprise advertisers with strict vendor compliance standards.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is insufficient evidence
